name: Tea Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Steep the tea leaves in vodka for up to 24 hours. Do not steep longer, as a bitter taste will develop.
2. Strain the mixture and add sugar syrup.
3. Age the liqueur for 2 weeks.
4. Your favorite tea may be used for the desired flavor, and spices can also be added.
Yield: 1 pint
Container: Quart jar
